title: TikTok Challenge Search Scraper
description: Search TikTok challenges and hashtags by keyword.

keywords.title: Search Keywords
keywords.description: Keyword, topic, niche, product, brand, or hashtag terms to search. Batch multiple keywords in one run to reduce Apify run overhead.

keyword.title: Legacy Single Keyword
keyword.description: Backward-compatible single keyword input for API callers. Ignored when Search Keywords contains valid values.

count.title: Results Per Keyword
count.description: Number of challenge results to request for each keyword. Scrappa accepts 1-50.
